summary: Iteration 9 critical bug fix testing COMPLETE. All 4 reported bugs verified as FIXED. Backend: 7/7 tests passed. Frontend: All features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test tabs and tables for testing: TEST_VoidTest, TEST_KDSTest, TEST_BarRouting, Test Guest Void, Test Table KDS
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 bug fixes ALL VERIFIED. Test data exists: multiple kitchen tickets (T1, T2, T3), open tabs (Carlos - R$60, Test Guest Void - R$0). Tables: #1 occupied by Carlos, #2 occupied by Test Table KDS. Backend tests cover: void item, KDS send with session_id, KDS routing food->kitchen/drinks->bar, table add-item endpoint, header elements.

bug_1_kds_send_to_kitchen.description: KDS 'Send to Kitchen' was failing because frontend sent table_id instead of session_id
bug_1_kds_send_to_kitchen.evidence: Sent item to KDS from Table #2, ticket appeared in Kitchen with table number T2 and guest name 'Test Table KDS'. Toast showed 'Sent to kitchen/bar!'. No errors occurred.

bug_2_void_delete_items.evidence: Added Heineken to tab, clicked void button on hover, item removed, tab total went from R$18.00 to R$0.00. Toast showed 'Item removed'. Backend test confirmed: voided=true returned.

bug_3_exit_modal_instead_of_toast.description: Exit page warning was a toast instead of modal
bug_3_exit_modal_instead_of_toast.evidence: Code review confirmed: PulseExitPage.js line 176-177 has exit-modal-overlay with proper modal structure. Modal shows for blocked wristband or open tab scenarios.

bug_4_header_overlapping.evidence: Tested TAP, Table, Kitchen pages. All have 33px gap between Home and Logout buttons. Dividers (.h-5.w-px.bg-border) separate elements properly. No overlapping detected.

tap_page.barman_selector: Present with data-testid='barman-selector', 4 options (Carlos, Maria, João, Ana)
tap_page.revenue_not_in_header: VERIFIED - only shows 'Tabs: N' count, no revenue display

table_page.disco_toggle: Present with data-testid='disco-toggle' for Back-to-TAP navigation
table_page.manage_button: Present with data-testid='table-settings-btn', opens table management panel

kitchen_page.tickets_displayed: 4 pending tickets shown with table numbers and guest names

exit_page.exit_modal_overlay: Present in code at line 177 with data-testid='exit-modal-overlay'

test_classes: TestKDSSendToKitchen - KDS send with session_id fix
TestHeaderElements - TAP stats and config endpoints
TestExitModal - tab-status endpoint for exit modal
